markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on Panther's product, strategy, and content voice.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI-Centric Strategy:** Panther is repositioning as an "AI SOC platform" to solve the alert fatigue crisis, where security teams ignore 60% of alerts due to overwhelming data volumes (median: 4TB/day).](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Core Value Prop:** The platform's AI agents compress triage time from 15–30 minutes to just minutes and cut costs by ≥50% versus legacy SIEMs, enabling teams to scale coverage without scaling headcount.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**"Aha\!" Moments:** The alert triage agent (auto-summaries, pivots) and natural language co-pilot (threat hunting, querying) are the key user workflows that demonstrate immediate value.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The voice must be pragmatic, technical, and transparent, using a proven format (define concept → real-world examples → weave in Panther as a solution) to build trust with a technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: A Broken SOC Model

  - [**Alert Fatigue:** The core issue is that security teams cannot keep up with the volume of data and alerts.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**Data Volume:** Median enterprise log volume is 4TB/day, a scale legacy SIEMs struggle with.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Result:** 60% of alerts are ignored, creating a massive security blind spot.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Breach Costs:** Longer "dwell times" (time to detect/contain) directly increase the financial and reputational cost of a breach.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### The Solution: Panther's AI SOC Platform

  - [**Core Capability:** Scalable detection and response across petabytes of log data.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [**Scalability:** Handles up to 100TB/day, with some customers processing multiple petabytes/month.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Cost Efficiency:** Serverless architecture and data filtering cut costs by ≥50% vs. legacy SIEMs.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [**AI-Driven Workflows:** AI agents automate tasks across the entire lifecycle.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Product Demo: AI in Action

  - [**Data Ingestion & Structuring:**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [Ingests data from AWS, Azure, GCP, and webhooks.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [Robust filtering drops non-security data to reduce cost and noise.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
      - [AI infers schemas from sample logs, simplifying onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [**Detection Creation (AI Co-pilot):**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [**Function:** Converts natural language into Python detection code.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
      - [**Status:** Rolling out to customers next week; formal launch in March.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
      - [**Significance:** Lowers the barrier to entry by reducing the need for direct Python knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**Alert Triage (AI SOC Analyst):**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
      - [**Function:** Automatically investigates and summarizes alerts.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
      - [**Process:** Enriches data, reads detection logic, and pivots to find related activity.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
      - [**Output:** A distilled summary with a risk judgment, visual flowchart, and actionable next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Threat Hunting & Querying (AI Co-pilot):**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
      - [**Function:** A full-screen chat interface for natural language queries.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
      - [**Capabilities:** Reporting, threat hunting, and querying all system data (pipelines, schemas, alerts).](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [**Significance:** Provides an intuitive abstraction layer over the entire SIEM, simplifying complex tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)

### Content & Marketing Strategy

  - [**Target Audience:** Sophisticated security teams seeking high automation and practical AI, not "turn-key" users.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2864.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)
      - [**Primary:** Google SecOps, CrowdStrike, Elastic, Splunk.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Teams offboarding from MDRs (e.g., Expel) or replacing homegrown tools.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)
  - [**Content Voice & Tone:**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [**Practical:** Rooted in real-world use cases and implementation details.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3159.0)
      - [**Technical:** Speaks the language of engineers and CISOs without being opaque.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [**Transparent:** Openly discusses capabilities, limits, and trade-offs of the technology.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3077.0)
  - [**Effective Content Format (from Substack):**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
    1.  [**Define Concept:** Explain the topic in a security context.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3349.0)
    2.  [**Provide Real Examples:** Show practical applications, weaving in Panther as a solution.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)
    3.  [**Offer Actionable Advice:** Position the content as solving a problem.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)
    4.  [**Include a CTA:** A soft ask to learn more about Panther's implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=3452.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jack:** Share new AI-centric marketing materials with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Ingest new materials to inform content artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Adopt the defined content voice and format for all deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/ufrGZb_7xsm_futxG73veaGs5Rb3asoy?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
